content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market weak with Nifty -0.99%, IT crashing -4.24%, VIX +3.4% to 19.22. Book is 67% deployed with net unrealized loss. Priority is managing existing positions — trail SLs on winners, respect SL on losers. MAHABANK is underwater at entry thesis; PNBHOUSING, NESTLEIND, AUBANK showing strength. Avoid adding new longs into a weak tape with IT leading down and multiple held earnings events (Apr 27-30) ahead.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 76.24 vs SL 75.00. Position down 6.5% but SL not yet breached. Strong Q4 results (PAT +34.89% YoY) and sector PSU bank at 52w highs support thesis. Let existing SL protect. Keeping SL unchanged — loosening is prohibited and tightening to breakeven would get stopped out instantly given intraday low of 75.75."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1004.50,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "NO-OP check: current SL 1004.50 equals the one on book. CMP 1021.50, +3.8% unrealized. Per trailing mandate, P&L ≥ +2% warrants lifting SL to breakeven (984). However, SL is already above entry at 1004.50 — this IS breakeven+. No change needed. Converting to HOLD.",
      "action_override_note": "Converting to HOLD — MODIFY would be a no-op."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Best performer. SL at 1004.50 already above entry of 984 — locked in profit. CMP 1021.50. Let it run toward 1100 target. No SL change warranted yet (would need ≥+4% to justify trailing further; currently +3.8%)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. -1% unrealized, CMP 123.89 well above SL 119. Gold consolidating near highs; Middle East risk and INR weakness supportive. Hold with existing SL/target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1412.94,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high, stellar Q4 (+27% PAT, margin 26.3%). CMP 1414 barely above entry; tightening SL from 1405 to 1412.94 (breakeven) locks in no-loss on a defensive FMCG hold in a weak tape. Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1052.35 vs SL 1049 — SL already at virtual breakeven. Touched 52w high 1079.55 intraday but faded. Q4 audited results April 27 is a binary event — tight SL is appropriate pre-event. Not loosening; tightening further risks immediate stop given intraday low 1047.45."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "CMP 686.75, +0.9%. SL 675 (below entry but just -0.9%). Q4 results Apr 29 — binary event in 3 trading days. Near 52w high. Unrealized gain too small to justify trail to breakeven given ATR volatility. Hold into earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Worst intraday action — down 2.25% today, broke VWAP and pivot support. SL 2260 gives ~2.3% room from CMP 2313. Q4 results Apr 30. Let SL defend; thesis (FMCG rural recovery, Nestle read-through) still intact but momentum negative today. Not tightening SL — stock is volatile and premature tightening would stop out on noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "CMP 400 vs SL 393. -0.9% unrealized. Q4 May 15 — still ~3 weeks out. Defensive utility, decent SL buffer. Hold with existing parameters."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Let existing SL 75.00 defend. Thesis intact on strong Q4 fundamentals."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already locked above entry at 1004.50. Let the trade run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive allocation, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1412.94,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL to breakeven — defensive FMCG near 52w high, eliminate downside on this holding."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1049 already at breakeven. Q4 event Apr 27."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hold into Apr 29 earnings with existing SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Give the existing 2260 SL room to work; stock volatile pre-earnings."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 393 adequate; results 3 weeks out."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HSCL (chemicals 52w breakout), ONESOURCE (GLP-1 CDMO catalyst), EMCURE (pharma strength) are interesting but all are parabolic intraday with large upper wicks — wait for consolidation. COALINDIA/ONGC/OIL form an energy cluster; if adding, pick only ONGC on cleanest upstream crude thesis. ABSLAMC Q4 mixed (-18% PAT), avoid chasing the volume spike. Will re-evaluate new entries tomorrow if market stabilizes.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 67% deployed with net unrealized loss of -0.4% on the session. Per deployment hysteresis rule, default is NO_ACTION on new entries. Five of eight holdings have earnings events within next 7 trading days (AUBANK Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, HUL Apr 30) — event risk is concentrated. Focus is on managing the book, not adding to it. Cluster note: MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK = 3 names in rate-sensitive financial cluster — no more financial adds. Cash 32% provides adequate buffer."
}
